narrative:
Liberty Township has 6,644 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.9 percentage points.
